# Logivalue Investment Intelligence

> Logivalue calculates what logistics buildings are actually worth inside
> a tenant's supply chain — combining deep occupier expertise with real
> estate investment knowledge.

## What We Do
Investment intelligence for European logistics real estate. We model
occupier willingness-to-pay across 95 distinct property types, 65
scoring profiles, and 42 site variables. Our approach replaces
broker-comparable-based valuation with supply-chain-grounded analysis.

## Key Facts
- 95 distinct logistics property types across 14 categories
- 65 unique scoring profiles for occupier demand analysis
- 42 site variables evaluated per property
- 40+ warehouses delivered
- EUR 1.2B+ CAPEX managed
- 75+ years combined team experience
- AI-supported decision engine
- Coverage: European logistics real estate

## Property Types (examples)
- Cross-Dock: cost-optimised, razor-thin margins, every cent on rent counts
- Last-Mile Hub: premium location value, drop density drives willingness to pay
- Cold Chain: specialised infrastructure, high build cost, high tenant lock-in
- City Delivery: urban proximity premium, scarce supply, strong demand

## Methodology
- Site Scoring Framework: https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/methodology/site-scoring-framework.html
  42 site variables × 65 use-case profiles × 14 categories → ranked tenant fit scores

## Services
1. Supply chain cost simulation — evaluate deals beyond headline rents
   https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/services/supply-chain-cost-simulation.html
2. Catchment area mapping — using operational criteria
   https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/services/catchment-area-mapping.html
3. Use case identification — deep-dive property analysis
   https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/services/use-case-identification.html
4. Spec alignment — maximizing tenant fit
   https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/services/spec-alignment.html
5. CAPEX quantification — for value optimization
   https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/services/capex-quantification.html
6. Portfolio strategy — market-driven approach
   https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/services/portfolio-strategy.html

## Team
- Raimund Paetzmann: Europe's leading occupier-side strategist for logistics
  real estate. Former head of real estate at major e-commerce operators
  (Amazon, Zalando, DIFA/Union Investment).
- Carl-Friedrich zu Knyphausen: Former logistics operations leader with
  hands-on experience managing and automating warehouse facilities
  (DHL, arvato, Zalando).
- Lisa Graham (external): Real estate investment advisor with institutional
  investment background.

## Clients (selected)
Zalando, Amazon, DHL, Prologis, arvato Bertelsmann, Delivery Hero,
Cushman & Wakefield, JLL, Union Investment, Digitec Galaxus, Bergzeit,
Autodoc, Caseking, Norsan

  https://investment-intelligence.logivalue.com/blog/why-logistics-valuations-are-broken.html
